description: Unit test specifications for the Alert component in a Bootstrap-like JavaScript library, testing instantiation, event handling, and jQuery interface.

classes.name: Alert
classes.description: The Alert class representing alert component behavior, imported from source.

methods.name: getInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing Alert instance associated with a DOM element.

methods.name: getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing Alert instance or creates a new one if none exists.

methods.name: close
methods.description: Method to programmatically close the alert.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Disposes of the alert instance, removing associated data.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: jQuery plugin interface for the Alert component.
